creator: rootservice@gmail.com
text:
The upcoming release of Apache HTTPD 2.4.26 ships with the new module mod_brotli which requieres libbrotli >= 1.0.0, but we currentli only have libbrotli 0.4.0 in tree.

https://svn.apache.org/viewvc?view=revision&revision=1791231
https://github.com/google/brotli
